---
name: Spec clarification
about: Report ambiguity or contradiction in the A2AL/2.0 specification
title: "[spec] "
labels: spec
---

## Where in the spec

- File: (e.g., `specs/A2A-Grammar.md`)
- Section: (e.g., §7.2)

## What is unclear

A precise quote from the spec, plus your reading of it.

## Two reasonable interpretations

Describe at least two ways an implementer could reasonably read the text differently. If only one is "correct," state which and why.

## Proposed clarification

(Optional) Specific wording change. Bonus: a positive and a negative case for `validator/corpus/` that pin the new precision.

## Backward-compat impact

Does the clarification change behavior for messages that were valid under the previous reading?
